**Thesis:** The only way to tap into your natural, free-flowing, distance-producing swing as a woman is with the Pendulum Swing Sequence. 

# 

# **\[LEAD 2 TEST — EMPATHETIC/CURIOSITY/PROBLEM FOCUSED\]**

If you’re a woman who feels as though your swing is free and fluid one day and a mess the next.

Like no matter how much potential you KNOW you have inside…

It always seems to feel like something’s “missing” with your posture… your rhythm… or your contact into the ball.

Or ESPECIALLY if you’re a woman who feels the frustration of your hips or chest “getting in the way” of your own swing…

And that NO amount of online swing tips or male instructors could EVER give you the right guidance for YOUR body…

Then what you’re about to see is quite possibly the LAST golf lesson you’ll ever need.

Because in the next few moments…

I’m about to reveal the first and ONLY swing anatomically designed for women like you and me. 

A swing that in just 3 simple steps and 5 minutes of focused practice…

Activates the comfortable, free-flowing, and powerful pendulum motion… that SIGNIFICANTLY reduces the fat shots… thin shots… and topped shots that are sucking the fun from your game.

Meaning as early as TODAY… 

You could start rising into not only your raw, PHYSICAL, distance-producing potential as a woman… 

But start enjoying the quiet, inner confidence that strengthens your self-belief and multiplies your enjoyment on the course... 

EVEN — and especially — if you’re self-conscious, introverted, and in ANY WAY intimidated by other players. 

And know this:

While I can’t promise to silence those impatient men on the first tee who complain before they’ve even seen you hit a shot…

Or the mansplainers who can’t help but dish out unsolicited tips even though they just shanked their last two shots… 

What I CAN promise you is THIS…

By the end of this short video presentation…

You’ll have in YOUR hands the game’s FIRST and ONLY swing designed BY a woman… FOR a woman… 

That will have you playing SUCH consistent, relaxed, and confident golf…

That YOU will be the one setting the pace for the men with your effortless, accurate golf shots.  
That YOU will be the one setting the pace with your effortless, accurate golf shots. 

So if that sounds like the type of golf YOU’D like to play…

Then settle in and get ready because you’re about to find EXACTLY what you’ve been looking for since the moment you first picked up a club. 

But first… 

# **\[LEAD 1 — PROBLEM — LEAD 2 PICKS UP HERE\]**

Have you ever seen the golf swing broken into positions before?

It’s labelled P1… P2… P3… all the way to P10.

It’s madness.

THAT right there… is the Male Swing Model.

A complex system of mechanics built DECADES ago that wasn’t designed with women in mind: 

Your height… your upper body strength… your hip structure… and of course, your chest shape. 

Yet it’s STILL used as the foundation for almost every lesson, magazine article, and Youtube video today.

And THAT’s the reason why nothing you’ve been taught EVER truly works…

Because it’s all based on the male anatomy and our… bodies… are… DIFFERENT. 

So how are you supposed to play great golf and enjoy the game with a swing model that isn’t built for your body?

The truth is… you can’t.

And that’s why SO many women today feel frustrated, disempowered, and self-conscious — especially when playing in front of others.

Because the fact is…

No amount of lifting… setting… hinging… or mechanically manipulated “positions”... will EVER tap into the natural, free-flowing, powerful swing that’s been hiding inside of you — all along. 

# **\[UMP \- CPB CHUNK 1 — MALE INSTRUCTORS\]**

And before we go any further…

There’s something ELSE I need to get off my chest because THIS is a truth most coaches will NEVER tell you about.

Most golf instruction today is being taught BY men… FOR men… 

And it’s costing women like you a huge amount of struggle you SHOULDN’T have to deal with. 

The reason is because most male instructors teach what they KNOW… what they FEEL… and what they SEE working for THEIR body.

So they prioritize lag… leverage… and loaded mechanical positions that get you to “hold the angle as long as possible.”

Now, don’t get me wrong — there are plenty of BRILLIANT male coaches out there.

But when you’re receiving golf “instruction” from someone who COMPLETELY misses the boat on how YOUR body moves…

You’re not just being fed bad habits… you’re learning someone else’s swing.

And this means… no matter how many drills or tips you try…

You’re almost always left trying to “fix” a swing that was never yours in the first place.

Leaving you feeling trapped in a cycle of frustration and declining joy.

# **\[UMP \- CPB CHUNK 2 — HIPS\]**

Now, the second reason the Male Swing Model is having such a negative impact on your golf game has to do with something NO ONE in the golf industry is talking about…

Your Q Angle.

Now watch closely…

Because this is one of the most BEAUTIFUL gifts of being a woman… 

And just happens to be one of the biggest advantages in your golf swing no one’s ever shown you. 

![Women's Sport & ACLs - What Makes Women More Likely to ...][image1]

See, your Q Angle is the space between your hips and your knees.

And in women… your Q Angle is naturally wider because it’s primarily designed to do ONE thing… give birth. 

This means with a slightly wider pelvis… lower center of gravity… and MUCH greater flexibility compared to men…

Your Q Angle is anatomically designed to move… turn… rotate… and generate EFFORTLESS power in your golf swing. 

But the problem is… 

The Male Swing Model that dominates almost every lesson, magazine, and online video today — caters to the EXACT opposite.

NARROWER hips…

HIGHER center of gravity… 

And a SMALLER Q Angle that makes it easier for men to generate rotational torque and chase speed with brute force.

So when YOU — as a woman with a naturally larger Q Angle — try to follow these same Male Swing cues…

You’re essentially forcing your body to “muscle its way” through movement patterns it was NEVER designed to repeat.

And as I’m sure you’ve experienced on the course in social or high-pressure situations…

Trying to swing this way almost ALWAYS leads to overcompensations like swaying and standing up out of posture…

Resulting in not only a heightened risk of injury… but leaves you with that constant feeling that you’re fighting against your own swing. 

And if you’re like most of the thousands of women I’ve coached…

The WORST part about these overcompensations for you ISN’T the fat shots, thin shots, lost power, OR the lack of distance…

It’s the stressful feedback loop out on the course that leaves you feeling rushed… nervous… and makes you play worse\!

**\[UMS TEASE\]**

But it doesn’t have to be that way for you ANYMORE…

Because in just a moment, you’re about to see the quick, simple and ONLY way for ANY woman — including you…

To activate the effortless, powerful, pendulum swing WAITING to emerge from within you. 

But before I do… 

Let me quickly address the elephant in the room — and one of the most important and frequently asked questions my female students ask me that the male swing model does NOT address.

*“Erika, why does it feel like my chest always seems to get in the way of my swing? And how do I fix it?”*

**\[UMP \- CPB CHUNK 3 — CHEST\]**

Now, that’s a great question… so let me explain real quick WHY that happens…

And show you how your chest can actually HELP you have a more repeatable golf swing — no matter WHAT your chest size is. 

You see, as you’ve probably experienced…

Most popular swing tips simply aren’t created for women like us — especially if you’re a woman who’s more top-heavy. 

So what happens?

You try to swing ACROSS your chest… but your chest gets in the way…

Which is why you stand up… and pull your swing off your natural pendulum path. 

This leads to those split-second overcompensations like swaying off the ball or throwing the club with your hands through impact.

And so before you know it…

Your natural chain reaction of effortless power becomes an awkward mess of tense movements… that give you almost NO chance of making consistent, ball-first contact. 

**\[UMP \- SOCIAL PROOF \+ TRANSITION INTO UMS TEASE\]**

And that’s a real tragedy for a lot of women.

Because the truth is… 

Your swing has at least 15 yards of distance… per club… BEGGING to be unleashed.

And the good news is…

You don’t need ANY more speed… swing mechanics… or unnatural, forceful “positions” to unlock it. 

All you need are the right movements for YOUR body… in the right order… at the right time. 

Quick gold one-liner 1 to build suspense  
Quick gold one-liner 2 to add to suspense

# **\[UMS TEASE\]**

The simple 3-step sequence I’m about to show you…

Is the first thing I teach to ALL of my female students who feel blocked, stuck, or restricted in their swing.

Because it gives your body the space, rhythm and freedom to move naturally. 

So flush contact… effortless power…and straighter, longer golf shots feel as automatic to you as breathing. 

# **\[UMS DEMONSTRATION\]**

To better illustrate the pendulum swing in action… I want to show you what it looks like with one of my BEGINNER students. 

As you watch this student, notice how relaxed her body is.

Before she ever had a chance to get caught up in the Male Swing Model of "hinging"... "holding lag"... or "muscling” her way through every shot…

I INSTEAD showed her how to simply ALLOW the momentum of a pendulum swing to lift and move her body through its natural range of motion.

The result?

She doesn’t even need to think about mechanics at all…

And her swing… is… BEAUTIFUL.

Her body turns freely…

Her arms and chest stay in sync…

Which means her clubhead returns straight into the back of the ball — square, centered, and LOADED with power — without any strain or force.

And here’s the best part:

Almost every woman I’ve shown this to can FEEL the difference in MINUTES — no matter how long they’ve been playing.

Because when you have a pendulum swing… 

You can FEEL the clubhead glide around your body from setup to impact with precision and confidence.

No mechanical checkpoints…

No robotic positions… 

And NO complicated swing thoughts leaving you paralyzed over the ball.

Just a simple, natural, even LIBERATING swing that feels as good as it looks.

# **\[OVERCOMING OBJECTIONS \+ ADDRESSING 3 OF THE BIG 4: SAFE/FAST\]**

Now maybe you're watching this and that little voice in your head is wondering…

*“Okay, Erika… but I’ve been playing for a while and I’m pretty set in my ways. Will this actually work for me?”*

Well, if that’s you — then I want to introduce you to THIS golfer.

She preferred not to mention her name but she’s been playing for years. 

She’s taken lessons, watched YouTube videos, even tried upgrading her clubs.

But the first thing she said to me when she walked into the lesson was:

*“Erika, no matter what I try — I feel like my body is always getting in the way of my swing.”*

And you know what? I’ve heard that more times than I can count.

Because when most golf instruction is built around the Male Swing Model…

It’s no wonder so many women come to me saying nothing ever feels “RIGHT”.

But once we walked through the pendulum swing sequence together…

Within five minutes, she looked like a different golfer.

She stopped trying to swing harder… and let her body and pendulum swing do the work FOR her instead.

She felt how EASY it was to go from brute force… to natural, tension-free rhythm.

And after flushing her first shot straight down the middle… she turned to me and said,

*“Why didn’t anyone ever teach me this before?”*

Which brings me to Tanya.

Tanya was a little different.

She’s athletic, mid-50s, solid swing… but she came in highly skeptical.

*“I don’t see how such a simple change could make that big of a difference,” she said.*

And I totally get it.

Golf is full of overpromises and swing tips that sound too simple to be real.

But just like you’re seeing here — we got her swing working WITH her body… 

Which eased her tension and gave her the confidence to just “let go” and trust her natural swing. 

She launched her first shot straight out of the middle…

Her mouth dropped…

And she turned to me and said,

*“That felt effortless — and it just flew.”*

That’s the moment it clicks.

Because sometimes, the reason nothing’s worked isn’t that YOU’VE failed…

It’s that no one ever showed you a swing that’s actually designed for YOU.

And these three women — like so many others — all came in with the same doubts:

*“I’ve tried everything. Nothing works for my body.”*

That’s because the Male Swing Model isn’t designed for your body. This is.

*“Erika, I’ve been playing a long time and I don’t want to start over again.”*

You’re not starting over. You’re just giving yourself the chance to let everything you’ve learned finally fall into place.

*“This just sounds too simple to be real.”*

But it IS simple — and that’s why it works within minutes.

*“I don’t want to make any more changes to my swing.”*

You’re not changing your swing — you’re eliminating the tension that’s holding it back.

*“Erika… I’m just not strong enough for a powerful swing like this one.”*

The good news is… this isn’t about strength. 

It’s about sequencing — and your body already knows how to do that when you tap into your natural, feminine pendulum swing.

So if you’ve ever felt like you’re trying to fit your body into a swing that’s not designed for you…

Or you’re constantly struggling swing “flaws” that feel like a complete mystery to you…

Or maybe you’ve even gone as far as to think your body type isn’t even suited to play this game…

Then I want you to know:

You… can… do this. 

The pendulum swing is **easy** — because it’s built around how your chest and hips are already designed to move.

The pendulum swing is **safe** and **reliable** — because it removes strain and makes your best shots repeatable.

And best of all… the pendulum swing works **FAST** — because you don’t have “think” or “try”... you just have to FEEL. 

FEMALE PROOF CLIP Katherine [https://app.iconik.io/asset/b8130382-70a2-11ef-9581-f6839a1214f9](https://app.iconik.io/asset/b8130382-70a2-11ef-9581-f6839a1214f9) 

# **\[THE 4TH BIG 4: ONLY\]**

By now, you’ve seen what happens when you tap into a swing that works WITH your body… not against it.

You’ve seen how quickly things can begin to fall into place for you…

Your timing… your rhythm… and the natural, RAW feminine power sitting — waiting inside of you. 

But here’s the most important thing I can tell you right now:

There’s only ONE way to activate your free-flowing pendulum swing…

And that’s by using the 3-step Pendulum Sequence that makes this swing work for ANY woman — at any stage of your game.

That’s because I’ve spent the last 30 years refining this 3-step sequence with thousands of female golfers of ALL different ages and swing types.

And what that means for YOU is…

You’re about to learn the simplest and most EFFECTIVE way to unlock the consistent… effortless swing you’ve been looking for to play your best golf — no matter WHAT your swing looks like today. 

So let me walk you through EXACTLY how the Pendulum Swing Sequence works.

# 

# **\[EXISTING VSL STARTS HERE\]**

Now, like I said…

There are THREE simple steps to this sequence and they HAVE to be done IN ORDER because each step builds on the one before it. 

Step one is the towel turn.

This is the most important of the three steps…

Because it starts the backswing with your BODY… not your arms.

That means no more obsessing over your takeaway…

No more setting your wrists…

And no more worrying about forcing positions.

Instead, you’ll feel the pendulum motion naturally extend your arms on the perfect plane in a way that feels smooth and effortless.

\[Show the women doing the “windmill drill” where they keep the lead hand down and turn their body with the trail arm and then clap their hands\]  
![][image2]![][image3]

And when you apply this same feel with my simple **“chest clearance trick”**…

Then, by the time you hit your first ball…

Your body will be primed and aligned for a balanced, fluid, and free-flowing pendulum swing.

For most women, if you only do this first step in the sequence…

You'll feel the power of the pendulum and see a dramatic improvement in your club-face control — as you start to eliminate fat shots and thin shots.

And that's already a big win.

But, like I said earlier, you have to follow the sequence to a T.

And that's why the second step is so important…

Because step two is the tee-to-toe drill.

The Tee-to-Toe drill is where everything we talked about with your hips comes full circle…

Because you already know your hips were built differently.

You already know your wider Q Angle changes how your lower body stabilizes… and why chasing those male swing positions always felt like a battle.

That’s why the Tee-To-Toe drill was designed to take all that pressure off you.

Because now, instead of forcing your body to muscle through the transition —

You finally have a swing that works with your natural structure.

No more swaying.

No more standing up out of posture.

No more feeling like your lower body’s fighting against you.

The Tee-to-Toe Drill keeps your feet grounded…

Your lower body balanced…

And your pendulum swing flowing all the way through to impact — naturally, effortlessly, the way it was always supposed to feel.

And when you flush that first shot…

You'll wonder how you ever made a swing without this.

At this point, you're only a few practice swings away from making the first full pendulum swing of your life…

Because all you have left is my Reverse Release Move…

That guards against overcompensation and permanently reverses ANY male swing mechanics that have been holding you back.

This is what automates the pendulum move SO deep into your swing…

That you’ll NEVER have to worry about another swing thought… position… or mechanical adjustment again. 

Everything I just described can be done in minutes.

So the only question is, are you willing to spend a few minutes to eliminate the Male Swing Model that’s suppressing your natural free-flowing motion?

How good is it going to feel knowing you can step up to the ball and make a zero-thinking swing that produces consistent, ball-first contact?

It's the best feeling in golf…

And for most women… they just do this sequence five minutes before each round…

Simplifying your warm-up so you can just go out there and enjoy the game instead of worrying about complicated mechanics.

Although the sequence can be done in minutes, there's no need to rush.

Just follow it step by step and let your body experience how it feels.

Because, when your body knows how it feels…

The pendulum takes care of swing mechanics for you automatically, and you'll never need another swing thought again.

So let me show you how you can start using this pendulum swing sequence for yourself right now.

In the past, the only way to learn it was to get one-on-one attention from me… 

Or to book a spot at one of my exclusive academies which can have a waiting list up to one year.

And all those students happily pay thousands of dollars for the opportunity to learn this sequence from me.

But I realize most women can’t take the time out of their busy lives to travel across the country to meet with me in person…

So I decided to produce a high-end video training to capture all the details of my pendulum swing sequence in high-quality HD video.

These videos walk you step by step through the pendulum swing sequence to produce a perfectly timed, on-plane swing that’s easy to repeat…

And gives you REAL confidence so you can play great golf anytime, anywhere.

I’ve never publicly released this woman’s only pendulum swing sequence video series you’re about to get inside the training.

I’ve covered every possible question you could have.

You can watch the pendulum swing sequence video training from any computer, smartphone, or tablet at your convenience anytime, as many times as you want — even while you’re out on the range.

The course feedback on these video lessons has already started pouring in\!

Female testimonial from current control VSL:  
*I was playing golf and I was so pissed off I couldn't hit a good shot. I felt stuck, felt robotic. My swing felt ridiculous. Then I tried to fix it with more technical thoughts, but I am so sick and tired of being a prisoner in jail with technical thoughts, and I stood on the first tee, right, left, right, left tap, go, and I hit the outta the ball exactly where I was aiming. That's the feel that I've been waiting for, that I knew was inside my body the whole time. I was excited with how, with my contact, but mostly I was excited with I'm outta jail, like I'm out of jail from the technical thoughts and I finally feel like an athlete.*

This means without you adding a SINGLE ounce of effort or swing speed…

You’ll start releasing your power into the back of the ball and sending your drives higher and farther off the tee than ever before. 

## \[Reason \#4 \- Pendulum Power Video Series Slice Fix\]

Four…

Meaning you can step up to every tee box knowing how to prime your swing for not only power and flush contact…

You’ll get ALL your money back, and the ONLY investment you’ll have made was your time. 

But on the UPSIDE…

Just THINK of what you can achieve when you say “YES” to the Pendulum Swing Sequence, and it WORKS. 

You apply the Sequence on the range and start FEELING the clubhead glide around your body with precision… effortless power… and near-perfect contact — every single shot. 

You walk onto the first tee of your next round, ready yet EAGER to trust your pendulum swing. 

And when you casually deliver the clubhead STRAIGHT into the back of the ball and look up to watch it sail higher and farther than you’ve hit it in months—maybe ever…

You’ll walk off the tee box KNOWING it wasn’t a fluke or luck.

You’ll know it’s because you’re NOW tapping into the natural, free-flowing, Pendulum Swing that’s YOURS to enjoy forever. 

And it won’t be long before your friends  will want to know your secret. 

THAT is your future right there when you decide to say “yes” to the Pendulum Swing Sequence today.

So don’t miss out. 

You already know this Pendulum Swing Sequence is the ONLY solution you’ll ever find to free your feminine swing…

And is THE answer you’ve been looking for to play your best, low-scoring golf for decades to come. 

So click the button below this video now…

And I’ll see you inside in just a second.

#### \[FAQs\]

Still here? Great.

It means you’re serious about unlocking your free-flowing, distance-producing swing…  
And you probably have one or two questions before making your decision.

I respect that — I always ask questions before making a final decision, too.

So here are the questions I get asked most from women before starting the Pendulum Swing Sequence:

**Does the Pendulum Swing Sequence really help women tap into their natural, free-flowing swing — even if I’ve struggled for years?**

Yes, absolutely\!

The reason this Sequence works is because it eliminates the ROOT cause of why most women feel blocked, stuck, or restricted in their swing…

Which is that your body is constantly being forced into positions and movements designed for men.

But when you allow your swing to follow the natural, pendulum rhythm already built into your hips, chest, and Q Angle…

Your body relaxes…

Your swing flows…

And consistent, ball-first contact starts happening naturally — the way it was always meant to for you.

**What do I get when I say “yes” to the Pendulum Swing Sequence today?**

As soon as you click the button below this video and complete your order…

You’ll get an email and text message with a link to open your first video lesson.

All you have to do is tap that link and start watching your 3-Step Pendulum Swing Sequence training.

And you can watch these lessons anytime, anywhere, as often as you like…

Because you’re also getting LIFETIME access to the entire program.

Plus, I’ve included several exclusive bonuses not available to the public.

First, you’ll get a seat in my upcoming LIVE Pendulum Swing Q\&A Session…

Where you can ask me your biggest swing questions directly.

Whether you’re wondering about your swing… your setup… or how to unlock more confidence under pressure…  
I’m here for you.

And YES — if you can’t make the call live…

You can send me your questions ahead of time. I’ll answer them during the call…  
And you’ll get the replay so you can listen anytime it fits your schedule.

Normally, I charge $197 for private students to attend these coaching calls…

But as a new Pendulum Swing student, your spot is FREE today.

**What else do I get with the Pendulum Swing Sequence?**

You’ll also receive a 14-day pass to our exclusive Scratch Club — designed to help you master every other part of your game.

Inside Scratch Club, you’ll find world-class coaching from golf legends like Nick Faldo, Hank Haney, Martin Chuck, David Leadbetter, and more.

This means no matter what part of your game needs attention —  
You have the world’s best instructors at your fingertips, 24/7.

Accessing Scratch Club is easy —  
Simply open your Pendulum Swing training portal and you’ll find all the bonus videos ready to watch.

And if you love the progress you’re making after 14 days — like most of my students do…

You can keep your Scratch Club access for just $29/month, billed automatically.

Or, if it’s not for you — simply send us one email, and you won’t be charged a thing.

It’s that simple.

**Do I get anything else when I say “yes” to the Pendulum Swing Sequence today?**

Yes — I’m also sending you The Confidential Guide to Ball-Striking Equipment for Women.

This insider guide includes exclusive discounts — over $1,000 worth —

And gives you the truth about the BEST-performing gear for female golfers.

Whether it’s clubs, shoes, or training aids…

This guide helps you avoid wasting money on equipment designed for tour pros — and shows you exactly what works for your swing.

The guide is yours free today, when you say “yes” to the Pendulum Swing Sequence.

**Am I covered by a guarantee?**

Of course\!

You’re covered by my 365-Day “Unlock Your Free-Flowing Swing Or It’s Free” Guarantee.

That means when you say “yes” today…

You’ll have an entire year to watch the videos, use the Sequence, and experience the difference.

And if you’re not blown away by how your swing feels and performs —

Just send me an email within 365 days, and I’ll refund every penny.

You either tap into your natural, effortless swing — or you get your money back.

Either way, you win.

How do I get started?

It’s easy.

Click the button below this video…

You’ll be taken to our secure checkout page.

Just enter your basic information — it takes about 30 seconds…

And you’ll immediately get access to your Pendulum Swing Sequence, all your bonuses, and your members-only video portal.

It couldn’t be simpler.

And within minutes, you’ll be watching your first lesson — ready to experience the swing that was designed for your body, not the male model.

So if you’re ready to feel confident, consistent, and powerful on the golf course again…

Click the button below, say “yes” to the Pendulum Swing Sequence…

And I’ll see you inside in just a second.
